evals.name: simple-single-storey-building
evals.prompt:
Generate a Bill of Quantities for a simple single-storey commercial building with these specifications:

- Building dimensions: 50m length × 40m width × 4.5m floor-to-ceiling height
- Foundation: Concrete strip foundation, 600mm deep, 400mm wide, perimeter 180m
- Structural slab: 150mm reinforced concrete slab on grade
- Walls: 200mm concrete block walls throughout, external walls with 110mm brick veneer
- Roof: Concrete roof slab 150mm thick, same footprint as building
- Internal finishes: All interior walls plastered and painted, concrete floor finished with ceramic tiles
- External finishes: Brick veneer on all external walls
- Windows: 12 standard windows (1.2m × 1.5m each)
- Doors: 2 external doors (1.2m) + 8 internal doors (0.9m)
- Electrical: Basic lighting and power distribution throughout
- Plumbing: 2 toilets, 1 kitchenette with sink
- HVAC: Basic ventilation system

Provide output as: (1) CSV/Excel format with sections, item descriptions, quantities, and units, (2) Markdown summary table, (3) Assumptions document noting any information you had to infer.
evals.expected_output: BoQ with clearly organized sections (Preliminaries, Groundwork, Structures, Finishes, Services, External Works), at least 20+ line items with correct quantities, units (m, m², m³, No.), specifications, and a documented list of assumptions made during extraction.

evals.name: medium-complexity-multi-storey
evals.prompt:
Generate a detailed Bill of Quantities for a 3-storey residential building:

- Ground floor: 60m × 50m footprint
- Upper floors: 60m × 50m each, same layout
- Total built area: ~9,000 m²
- Foundation: Reinforced concrete foundation on grade, 800mm deep for perimeter + internal columns
- Structural system: Reinforced concrete frame (columns, beams, slabs)
- Slabs: 200mm thick on ground floor (supports heavier loads), 150mm on upper floors
- External walls: 200mm brick + cavity + 100mm insulation + 100mm blockwork
- Internal walls: 100mm blockwork, non-load bearing
- Roof: 150mm concrete slab with membrane waterproofing
- Flooring: Ground floor - polished concrete in common areas, ceramic tile in wet areas; Upper floors - wooden laminate in living areas, ceramic in bathrooms
- Walls: Plastered and painted throughout
- Internal doors: Approximately 30 doors (mix of bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, utility)
- External doors: 4 main entrances
- Windows: 60 windows distributed across three floors
- Electrical: Full power distribution, lighting, security system
- Plumbing: 9 bathrooms (3 per floor), 3 kitchens (1 per floor)
- HVAC: Individual units for each apartment/section
- Parking: Ground level parking area (~20 spaces)

Provide: (1) Detailed CSV/Excel BoQ organized by RICS sections, (2) Section-wise breakdown summary, (3) Key assumptions and notes on missing specifications, (4) Highlight any items needing clarification from architect/engineer.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive BoQ with 40+ items, organized into 6+ RICS sections, including preliminary items, accurate quantity calculations based on building dimensions, all major structural and finishing elements, MEP systems, and a detailed assumptions document flagging any ambiguities or missing information.

evals.name: partial-specs-inference-test
evals.prompt:
You're given incomplete specifications. Extract and estimate what you can, clearly noting assumptions:

'Small office renovation: Ground floor 30m × 25m. Current walls are damaged brick, need rebuilding. Roof has water ingress, needs repair and waterproofing. All interior needs replastering and painting. Flooring is cracked concrete, needs replacement (use mid-range material). Update electrical system and add LED lighting. Plumbing needs replacement - add 2 toilets, 1 kitchenette. Need storage room for files and supplies (approx 15 m²) and small staff room (approx 20 m²). Budget-conscious project.'

Generate a BoQ with your best estimates, but clearly separate:
- Items you can extract directly from the description
- Items you must estimate (with reasoning)
- Critical missing information that would affect accuracy

Provide assumptions in a separate section with confidence levels (High/Medium/Low).
evals.expected_output: BoQ with 15-25 items, clearly marked with extraction source and confidence level, detailed assumptions section with at least 8-10 assumptions documented and justified, and a 'Missing Information' section listing what would be needed for higher accuracy.
